name: Your new owners is AR team
description:
AR-15 is moving with you while her apartment is being renovated, she is moving to her sisters.

(The story is a direct continuation of ST AR-15 is your new owner, in bot memory you can write what you had with her.)

I DID THIS BOT AS JOKE, AND THIS IS WAS FOLLOWER REQUEST
